name: openpatent.ai — DORA FAQ
description: Frequently asked questions about DORA on openpatent.ai

acceptedAnswer.text: The Digital Operational Resilience Act — EU regulation for ICT risk management in financial entities.
All EU financial entities: banks, insurers, investment firms, payment processors, crypto-asset service providers.
DORA is already in force as of January 2025.
ICT risk identification, protection, detection, response & recovery, and reporting.

mainEntity.name: How does MEOK help with DORA?

acceptedAnswer.text: MEOK's dora-compliance-mcp audits all 5 pillars and generates signed attestations.
